summary: Good soundboard capture (Jerry a bit low in the mix) featuring an outstanding Lost Sailor > Saint of Circumstance sequence and strong second‑set jams.
review: The recording is a solid soundboard source with clear overall balance, though several reviewers note that Jerry’s guitar sits too low in the mix. Musically the show shines on the second set – especially the soaring Lost Sailor > Saint of Circumstance transition – while the first set is uneven with a few lackluster moments.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the performance and only note modest mix issues; recording quality is good, show quality is strong, yielding an overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear soundboard tape, but Jerry’s guitar is noticeably low in the mix; Phil’s bass sounds stronger on audience recordings, suggesting a matrix could improve balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is uneven with a few off‑kilter numbers, but the second set builds beautifully, highlighted by a flawless Lost Sailor > Saint of Circumstance transition and high‑energy jams.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals described as beautiful and mellow; guitar sits low in the mix, limiting presence.
band_member_comments.Bob: Strong vocal delivery on Lost Sailor and Saint of Circumstance, praised for passion.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboards dominate, outshining Bob and often taking lead vocally.
band_member_comments.Drums: Described as a "drizzle of honey" with psychedelic, tribal rhythms; overall interesting performance.
